review_title: Everything you need to build digital ads - easily and without issues
description: Our business uses Celtra every day. It's a key part of our offering and we're very happy with it. We have a dedicated account manager and often hear about the regular updates they're making to the platform. Our overall experience with Celtra is overall good.
author: Neil J.
pros: Overall, Celtra is easy to use and reliable. It's an all-in-one platform for digital ad campaigns; design, build, traffic, analyse and report. The Ad Creator part of the platform is designed to help you build HTML5 digital media adverts and it does this with aplomb. As well as being easy to navigate and understand, it's a very powerful platform that allows you to create rich, dynamic and exciting media without needing code. It just works.
cons: As mentioned in the 'Pros', you have no access to the base-level code of your creations. To some, this may be a disadvantage, as you're limited in how much you can tinker with the deep foundations of you creations. Having said that - you do have the ability to add JavaScript elements on top of your creations.

review_title: Great graphics Designing platform for me
description: Celtra Creative Automation can still help firms develop high-quality digital advertising swiftly and efficiently. Businesses should use the free trial and seek alternatives if the cost is too expensive to maximise the platform. Before committing to the platform, firms should analyse its limitations and seek other creative automation solutions.
author: Pritam M.
pros: Celtra Creative Automation speeds up digital advertising creation the most. Creative automation lets advertisers swiftly generate high-quality ads for all digital media. Celtra's cloud-based technology makes project collaboration easier. Users can track their success with thorough metrics.
cons: Despite the many benefits of Celtra, there are some drawbacks to consider. The subscription costs for Celtra can be quite expensive, especially for small businesses. Additionally, the platform does have some limitations, such as a lack of support for animation and video.

review_title: New to the platform - but not the best experience so far...
description: So far - hasn't been the best. Could definitely improve in regards to support, and overall educating people about the platform as there were a lot of miscommunications and misinformation.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Photoshop file compatibility, reporting.
cons: There wasn't a lot of transparency of how different Celtra is to other platforms and the potential trails and tribulations weren't laid out clearly ahead of time. Support's suggestions have been to change our site to fit Celtra which should really never be the case since the vendor is providing us a service. A bit frustrating we went into this without the upfront knowledge of how tasking transitioning would really be. And now we're in our busiest quarters and scrambling to make things work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best CMP I've used
description: I work for an Digital Marketing and Technology company creating custom ads formats for our clients within the Celtra platform. The ads are all trafficked and served through Celtra as well.
author: Marcus R.
pros: Celtra is easy to understand and offers a great selection of out of the box components. The platform is intuitive and any user, novice or experienced, can easily build ads within minutes. Support is top notch and they are happy to help anyone and walk them through issues very thoroughly.
cons: Some of the components could use some help. The Video Player component being one of them. It needs to have more options to create custom video controls to allow the builder to have control over placement and appearance.

review_title: Preferred partner for a reason
author: Jamie H.
pros: The platform is easy to use but also reliable. I have encountered bugs and difficulty with all other providers and any issues we have come up against have been handled efficiently and effectively by our account manager or support team.
cons: The ability to mask objects in AdCreator would significantly improve animation.

review_title: Celtra Review
description: We can creative super rich media creatives on the fly and have it converted into tags in a matter of minutes. Due to the self service nature we are not reliant on anyone from customer service to action anything for us.
author: Mareen A.
pros: I really like the UI within Celtra. It is so easy to shift from creative tab to placement tabs and can customise the user access easily.
cons: The reporting tab can be improved further. Whilst the quick dashboard is helpful, anything custom does tend to confuse the user and feels very basic.

review_title: Easy to use, easy to navigate through the platform
description: The time we safe turning campaigns around since we start using wayin is insane.
author: Vikki M.
pros: The visual effects are pretty slick, easy to animate using the new timeline. I love the take photo component but we don't actually get to use it too often.
cons: I find it difficult to rotate properly, and this isn't really a con but the slider bar on the bottom of the timeline when animating, when i try to move it or scrub across its really difficult to actually select and move the timeline

review_title: ease of use
description: Ease of creating MRAID creative and serving it on various DSP platforms
author: Julien S.
pros: The platform is very quick to navigate and finding the various menus is not troublesome. The reports are very easy to pull and the creation of placements are very easy as well
cons: Revert changes to the creative view, you used to be able to switch creative when editing one creative. now you have to exit and click on the next creative you want to edit.

review_title: Versatile and Eay to Use Asset Management
description: The turn around time for the teams are amazing, its a shorter time frame between building to deployment. The ability to quickly transfer between advertisers expedites a tighter communication.
author: Rodney T.
pros: Creative developers can continue to retain most of the message essence even though it is populated into multiple dimensions.
cons: Its needs to evolve Into a ultra lightweight asset so that the creative delivery to mobile phones are ultra fast. Also must be agnostic to instream app video player.
author_profession: Vice President, Digital Sales Solutions and Operations

review_title: Ad Building Magic
author: Sean F.
pros: Celtra adopts the best features found in popular creative editing suites, allowing for an intuitive learning experience with a very small learning curve. The Support team is by far and away the best support staff that I've had assist me with a creative editing tool. Not only do they provide insightful feedback quickly, they go above and beyond in applying new thinking and functionality to our ad builds and ideas.
cons: There are a few things, such as font uploader and discrepancies between the ad builder to and how it renders in the preview environment, but nothing that would impact my recommendation of the software.

review_title: Solid and reliable, feature-reach but user friendly, suitable for advanced and simple use cases
author: Chris D.
pros: It works 99.5% of the time without fuss. Advanced creative features are very easy to include. Makes cross-device compatibility and distribution almost completely frictionless. I have enormous respect for Celtra as a company: smart people working on interesting products that genuinely advance the industry; responsive and appreciative of customer feedback; the structure of everything feels like it was genuinely thought out and built to last. Compared to any other creative platform I've used Celtra is just faster, better, easier to use, and with less troubleshooting. Documentation is generally excellent and whoever is writing the release notes is genuinely hilarious. The platform isn't standing still, changes are continuous and result in tangible improvements. It's genuine advancement, not catching up or imitation. Not afraid to terminate peripherals to focus on core and new products, whilst it's occasionally annoying (RIP viewability metrics), in the long run I personally think a bit of ruthless culling leads to a better overall result.
cons: There are a few annoying things; e.g. animations using API code and scenes/timeline animation in the same creative breaks layouts. Some gaps in product offering like VPAID but not VAST, full-screen and aspect-ratio pagebreak formats in Outstream but not Rich Media, etc. (Although I know some are WIP like VAST tags.) UI of the Builder has improved a lot but it could still be better: having to constantly juggle floating panels can be really annoying, the timeline animation is good but means covering most of the screen and creative when in use, etc. Some workflow improvements are definitely possible (if hard to articulate). The core product of enabling the easy building of rich creatives is great, but some of the peripheral things to do with actual distribution could be improved. Generating a lot of tags and then setting them up elsewhere is a tedious job so anything to make that easier would be good (e.g. saveable tag templates, bulk exports of full tags rather than just links). Don't like having to go to the 'Media Analytics' page to get to the report builder, or having to open a report in a new page before it can be downloaded if I just want a one-off report and not a saved template.

review_title: Take a step forward with automation
description: Overall great platform once you really understand it. Use it daily for work and it's really one of the best offerings around.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Majority of celtra is easy to use compared to other softwares. Unlike other softwares, you are easily able to scale your content in a variety of ways that save you time and money
cons: There are limitations and certain features that are lacking. Over the past 2 years there have been many improvements which is encouraging.

review_title: My experience has been good. The application is really intuitive, the documentation is good.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: it's very stable. You always make improvements. The preview side is in most of the cases exact. So you don't need to do a lot of test.
cons: It's not too flexible. Some components need an improvement, such as: add radial gradient to the shapes, responsive image for the 360 view component. More availability of fonts. The swipe component I think that need to be more flexible. Need to add more real world example of the JS documentation. In the beginning to learn the responsive of the unit is really difficult. nor with the examples becomes simple. In the end with experience with responsive it is still difficult in some cases to fix elements.

review_title: A must-have tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Celtra's creative ad platform has one of the best UIs I have worked with, encouraging innovation and creativity. The different creative components enable us as designers to create bespoke functional ads for each one of our clients.
cons: There's nothing I dislike, but like everything else in the world, the software can definitely use a few tweaks to better the UI - adding a 'colour palette' feature so we don't have to keep searching colour hex codes, a feature to allow categorising of creatives within a campaign - these would be extremely useful.

review_title: Best Custom Ad Software on the Market
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Celtra is the best of all the platforms I've used at the various publishers I've worked at. The UI is very smooth and easy to use. Customer support is also very quick and responsive which helps when we're working under tight deadlines. Discrepancies aren't huge and even the ad editor is pretty intuitive.
cons: I think the reporting functions are great in terms of how many metrics you can gather. However, pulling these reports can take a very long time. It would be best if there were shorter wait times for reporting.

review_title: fairly easy to use and components that are useful
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the auto-compression of assets and the video capabilities. The light weight weather effects are nice too.
cons: Inability to save and preview without updating the live ad, it would be great if the timeline worked together with actions and events, would love ability to create interactive end card for pre-roll.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great platform for creative and innovative format
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I appreciate the variety of format The Analytics parts is also very interesting to have insight about what works
cons: I think there is a lack of data partner for dynamic creative It would be great if the platform have some partnership for example to insert live score into a format

review_title: All the tools you need to succeed
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The platform has one of the best reporting UI I have ever used, making it super easy to get in-depth analysis of where your creativity is serving and allow for maximum optimizations.
cons: The platform lacks a good way to export creative tags. The amount of clicking back and forth and opening multiple windows when trafficking can lead to unnecessary mistakes that could be prevented if the tags were all in one central window.
author_profession: Manager - Ad Operations and Media Buying

review_title: Love the companys and the support for the last 5 year
description: Our business was first built around the software
author: Nik K.
pros: The people behind it, the customisable analytics, the creative ad builder One platform for all our needs (well nearly all)
cons: Would love it more as a white-labelled software Easier to choose products/platform choose and then choose a product Benchmarks per region in real time, per product, per region, per category, per functionality

review_title: Great creative, repetitive reporting
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: How easy it is to build custom creative with amazing features and functionalities
cons: Reporting is vague and repetitive. Hard to pull what you actually need. Going through demos are a little clunky

review_title: Great Creative Platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to build custom creative executions, a lot of useful components, good customer support when any questions are asked.
cons: Workspace sometimes feels cluttered, expensive

review_title: One of the most advanced platforms
description: They team are always extreamly helpful
author: Gina M.
pros: There is very little that Celtra is able to deliver on. It really allows users to push the creative boundaries
cons: Due to the complexity of its capabilities, onboarding can be a lengthy process

review_title: Hands down the best ad building platform today.
description: Celtra's ability to make as simple or complex an ad as needed. Trackable, quantitative data easily accessed for all parties. Supported across the digital ad ecosphere, Celtra can handle any digital ad experience.
author: Keith W.
pros: From a designers perspective its easy to create engaging rich media ad units. From a client management side the ability to get deep granular data easily makes it perfect for both sides of the business, clients and your own.
cons: The inability to put a subset of custom font characters in a unit to reduce file size. Limited interactive components for the video product. I would also add a way to collapse a unit in the list but not archive it like with a turn down arrow. To help with going through long lists of units in a campaign.

review_title: Celtra feedback
author: Ankan Kumar G.
pros: easy to work very fast api are good and easy to use
cons: user interface, easy to use, camping hanging is very easy

review_title: Easy to use and very very user friendly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The components. I always use that because all of them are very easy to use and resolve a lot of problems fast.
cons: I love all of this platform. But some time the frequently updates some time changes a lot of things.
